sample_message: Dr. Meera, JIDA's Oct issue landed. One item relevant to your high-risk adult patients — 2,100-patient trial showed 3-month fluoride recall cuts caries recurrence 38% better than 6-month. Worth a look (2-min abstract). Want me to pull it + draft a patient-ed WhatsApp you can share? — JIDA Oct 2026 p.14
Dr. Meera, compliance note: DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15. If you use D-speed film, audit is needed; RVG/E-speed is safer. Want a 5-point SOP checklist?
Dr. Meera, IDA/CDE item for this week on 2 May at 19:00: IDA Delhi: Digital impressions — 2026 state of the art. 2 credits; free for members. Want a calendar note + 3-line patient-facing post?
Dr. Bharat, calls are down 50% vs 7d baseline 12; CTR 1.8% vs peer 3.0%. Want me to refresh your post around Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 today?
Padma, calls are up +15% vs baseline 18. Looks tied to kids yoga post. Want me to double down with a fresh post today?
Dr. Meera, Smile Studio opened 1.3km away with Dental Cleaning @ ₹199. Your counter should not be cheaper; use Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 + reviews. Want the draft?

Lakshmi, quick check: 12 reviews mention stylist skill. Is that still the strongest demand at Studio11 Family Salon? Reply with one service name; I will turn it into a Google post + 4-line WhatsApp reply.
Lakshmi, Diwali is later, but the April-May mini-bridal window is open now. Use a Bridal Trial post to book a 2-month skincare package before Oct-Dec rush. Want the draft?
Pooja, upcoming festival window is coming. Best move: one service-price post, not a blanket discount. Want me to draft it around 3 FREE Trial Classes?
Suresh, DC vs MI at Arun Jaitley Stadium tonight 19:30. Weekend matches shift demand to home-watch parties; push home-watch delivery orders. Use a delivery-first home-watch combo. Want banner copy?
Ramesh, summer shelf shift: ORS demand +40, sunscreen demand +38, antifungal demand +45. Your 68% repeat base is useful here. Want a WhatsApp note for ORS/sunscreen baskets?
Suresh, you are at 145 review count; 150 is within reach. Want me to draft a review-request WhatsApp for recent happy customers?
Suresh, 8 reviews this month mention late delivery. Quote pattern: 'waited 45 min'. Want a reply template + ops note?
Anand, it has been many days since our last note. For Chai Point Cafe (Sector 8, Chandigarh; 2189 views/26 calls), the clean next step is one profile recovery task. Want the 2-line version?
Dr. Bharat, Pro renewal is in 30 days; calls are down 5%, CTR 1.8% vs peer 3.0%. Want a renewal decision note with the 3 fixes most likely to recover leads?

Vikas, your Google profile is still unverified in Gomti Nagar, Lucknow. Verification can lift visibility by about 30%; at 720 views/month, that is roughly 216 extra profile views. Want the postcard/phone steps?
Ramesh, urgent: atorvastatin recall for batches ATR-2026-B3, ATR-2026-B7 by PharmaGenix. 9 repeat-Rx customers may need replacement. Want me to draft the customer note + pickup workflow?
Riya, views are down 20% this week, but Apr-Jun is a normal gym lull. Skip extra ads; protect 130 members with a summer attendance challenge. Want the draft?
Suresh, starter corporate thali: 10 @ Rs125, 25 @ Rs115, 50+ @ Rs105 + free delivery. Your Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 is already the anchor. Want me to draft the 3-line office WhatsApp?
Padma, draft kids yoga camp: age 7-12, 4 weeks, 3 classes/week, Rs2,499. Use Sat morning trial first. Want me to turn this into a GBP post + parent WhatsApp?

Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's Dental Clinic here. Your 6-month cleaning is due. I can hold a slot for Wed 5 Nov, 6pm or Thu 6 Nov, 5pm with Dental Cleaning @ ₹299. Reply YES to confirm, or share another time.
Hi Aditya, Karim's Salon here. Your appointment is tomorrow. I can hold a slot for tomorrow with Haircut @ ₹99. Reply YES to confirm, or share another time.

Namaste Mr. Sharma, Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy here. Your metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan stock runs out on 2026-04-28. Same dose/brand pack can be kept ready. Free home delivery to saved address. Reply CONFIRM to dispatch, or call us if dose changed.

Hi Rashmi, Karthik from PowerHouse Fitness here. It's been 57 days since your last visit; no pressure. You stayed 5 months, and weight loss was the focus. I can hold an easy comeback session this week. Reply YES; no auto-charge.
Hi Reyansh, Asha Dental Care here. Quick check-in. Want me to keep Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 ready for you this week?
Hi Karthik, Padma from Zen Yoga Studio here. Thanks for trying the kids yoga session on 22 Apr. I can hold the next spot on Sat 3 May, 8am. Reply YES to continue, or tell me a better time.

Hi Kavya, Lakshmi from Glamour Lounge Spa & Salon here. 196 days to your wedding, and your trial was on 15 Mar; this is the right window for skin prep. Want me to block Saturday for the first bridal prep session?

Dr. Meera, JIDA's Oct issue landed. One item relevant to your high-risk adult patients — 2,100-patient trial showed 3-month fluoride recall cuts caries recurrence 38% better than 6-month. Worth a look (2-min abstract). Want me to pull it + draft a patient-ed WhatsApp you can share? — JIDA Oct 2026 p.14

Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic here 🦷 It's been 5 months since your last visit — your 6-month cleaning recall is due. Apke liye 2 slots ready hain: Wed 6 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 7 Nov, 5pm. ₹299 cleaning + complimentary fluoride. Reply 1 for Wed, 2 for Thu, or tell us a time that works.
Quick nudge: your dashboard shows 6,777 missed searches in Sector 14 for makeup services — people are looking but not finding you. Want me to show how your listing would appear?
Anjali, since expiry 45 days ago, booking calls slipped 18% and 12 more clients moved into lapsed. Want a 7-day Aundh comeback post + WhatsApp?
